I have three straightforward mechanical part drawings in DWG format that Protolabs cannot accept. I need each one converted to a clean, watertight STP model that will upload without errors. 

While you’re converting, please add any missing overall and critical feature dimensions as well as the material specifications shown on the title block; these details must carry through so the quote Protolabs generates reflects the correct machining requirements. • One STP file per part, ready for direct upload to Protolabs 
• A quick visual PDF or screenshot of each model showing the added dimensions and material call-outs for confirmation

full_description:
لدي أرض غير منتظمة الأضلاع (مرفق صورة الكروكي بأبعاد وأطوال الأرض)، ولدي مخطط مبدئي للدور الأرضي (مرفق صورة المخطط). المخطط الحالي جيد ولكنه يحتاج إلى إعادة دراسة وتعديل جذري من قبل مهندس معماري محترف لحل بعض الإشكاليات وتلبية احتياجاتي الجديدة.
الاحتياجات والمكونات المطلوبة في المخطط (نفس المخطط المرفق + إضافة):
1 مجلس رجال + دورة مياه ومغاسل تابعة له.
2 غرفة طعام.
3 صالة عائلية واسعة.
4 مطبخ.
5 غرفة نوم إضافية (هذا هو المطلب الأساسي الجديد).
6 دورة مياه تخدم الصالة وغرفة النوم.
7 منطقة الدرج.
ملاحظات واشتراطات هامة جداً للمصمم (يرجى قراءتها بعناية قبل تقديم العرض):
 لا أريد أي "شطرات" (زوايا مائلة) داخل المبنى نهائياً
 الا اذا كان ذالك ضروري ولا مفر منه كيفية : يمكن للمصمم استيعاب الشطرات في الارتدادات الخارجية (الحوش)، أو استغلالها في تصميم مساحات غير رئيسية مثل: (مستودع صغير، غرفة غسيل، مناور، أو دواليب حائطية مخفية) بحيث يبقى الشكل الداخلي للغرف منتظماً.
 مرونة في التصميم: أنا مستعد لتقبل التضحية بمساحات بعض الغرف وتصغيرها بشكل معقول، ولدي مرونة تامة في إعادة ترتيب أماكن الغرف بالكامل (تغيير أماكن المجلس، الصالة، المطبخ.. الخ) إذا كان ذلك سيخدم فكرة إضافة الغرفة الجديدة ويضمن لي التخلص من الشطرات بشكل متناغم وذكي.
 يجب اخذ التهوية بعين الاعتبار المطلوب تسليمه:
 مسقط أفقي (Floor Plan) ثنائي الأبعاد (2D) يوضح التوزيع المعماري الجديد.
 تسليم الملفات بصيغة PDF وأيضاً الملف المصدري AutoCAD (DWG).
المرفقات:
1 صورة كروكي الأرض (بالمقاسات والزوايا).
2 صورة المخطط المبدئي الحالي.

full_description:
My main goal is to integrate each form with other apps through Zapier so information moves instantly without manual exports or copy-pasting. 

First priority is wiring the forms to multiple industry-specific platforms(i.e. Real Estate Transaction Coordination) —so every new submission triggers the right actions (record creation, field updates, tag changes, order processing, etc.). I’ll share API keys and sample form links; you’ll return a set of well-documented Zaps that: 
• capture all incoming Jotform data 
• map it cleanly to the fields I specify in each destination platform, and 
• include error handling and basic formatting where needed (dates, phone numbers, currency). 

Deliverables I expect: 
1. 5 working Zaps per platform, each fully tested in my Zapier account. 
2. A concise hand-off sheet summarising every trigger, action, filter, and code step used. 
3. Quick Loom or similar walkthrough (max 5 min) so my team can extend or duplicate the flows later.

full_description:
I am launching a new specialty coffee roastery and I am looking for a strong designer to help develop the visual identity.

The brand is very personal and built around independence, maturity, precision, and calm confidence. It should feel established, peaceful, simple, premium, and trustworthy — not loud, childish, cartoonish, or overly trendy.

I need help with:

* Logo
* Basic visual identity direction
* Colour palette
* Coffee bag / packaging concept
* Label layout for rotating coffees

The design should feel modern, refined, and distinctive, with strong shelf presence. I want the packaging to stand out without looking like typical loud specialty coffee branding.

The logo should be simple, memorable, and work well across coffee bags, labels, boxes, website, social media, documents, signage, and merchandise. I do not want generic coffee icons such as beans, cups, flames, mountains, or cartoon illustrations.

The tone of the brand should be:

Calm, confident, precise, honest, personal, mature, and independent.

Visual direction I like:

* Minimal but not boring
* Premium but not cold
* Strong typography
* Confident use of one main colour
* Matte / tactile / refined packaging feel
* Clean information hierarchy
* Scandinavian / European restraint
* Strong shelf impact

Visual direction to avoid:

* Cartoonish design
* Childish graphics
* Loud specialty coffee clichés
* Generic coffee symbols
* Trend-led design
* Overly playful branding
* Anything that feels cheap, random, or trying too hard

The final design system should be practical for a small roastery launching with rotating coffees, so it needs to be beautiful but also easy to use and repeat.

Please include examples of previous branding or packaging work, especially in coffee, food, drink, hospitality, or premium consumer goods.

Deliverables required:

* Logo files
* Brand colour palette
* Typography recommendations
* Packaging concept
* Label layout
* Basic brand guidelines
* Editable source files

I am looking for someone with strong taste, restraint, and the ability to create a serious, recognisable brand — not just a quick logo.

full_description:
We are looking for an experienced WordPress web designer/developer to help us finish and professionally update our company website: americool.us.

We already purchased and installed a WordPress template/theme and updated part of the website as a draft with our company information. However, we need a professional freelancer to clean up the design, improve the layout, update the content, optimize the website, and make it look like a polished, trustworthy HVAC company website.

Our company is Americool Comfort, a licensed HVAC contractor serving residential and commercial customers in the Bay Area, California.

Scope of Work

The freelancer will be responsible for:

Review the current draft website and template structure.
Update the homepage to look professional, modern, and conversion-focused.
Organize and improve service pages for HVAC services, including:
AC repair and replacement
Furnace repair and replacement
Heat pump installation
Mini-split / multi-zone systems
Commercial HVAC service
Preventive maintenance
Update company contact information, call-to-action buttons, forms, and service area information.
Improve mobile responsiveness for phones and tablets.
Improve website speed and remove unnecessary template/demo content.
Make the design consistent with our logo, colors, and HVAC business branding.
Add or improve sections for:
About Us
Services
Why Choose Us
Service Areas
Reviews/testimonials
Contact form
Emergency/same-day service call-to-action
Basic on-page SEO setup:
Page titles
Meta descriptions
Headings
Image alt text
Clean URLs where needed
Make sure the website is easy for us to edit later in WordPress.
Final testing before completion.
Important Requirements
Must have strong experience with WordPress business websites.
Must have experience working with existing WordPress themes/templates.
Must understand responsive design.
Must be able to make the site look professional, clean, and trustworthy.
HVAC, contractor, construction, home service, or local service business website experience is a plus.
Please do not rebuild the website from scratch unless necessary. We prefer improving the current draft/template.
Deliverables
Fully updated WordPress website
Mobile-friendly and desktop-friendly design
Clean homepage and service pages
Updated contact forms and call buttons
Basic SEO setup
Removal of unused demo/template content
Final review and revisions
Short explanation or screen recording showing how we can edit key sections later
What We Will Provide
WordPress access after hiring
Company logo
Company contact information
Existing website draft
List of services
Photos if needed
Any text/content we already have
Please Include in Your Proposal
Examples of WordPress websites you have completed.
Experience with contractor, HVAC, plumbing, construction, or local service websites.
Which page builder you usually work with.
Estimated completion time.
What you need from us to start.
Confirmation that you can work on an existing WordPress template and not just build from scratch.

We are looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and able to make our website look professional and ready for customers.

full_description:
"The role must be for US based Female assistant." Other guys will be ignored.
I run a growing business and need an experienced assistant who can jump in right away. Your core focus will be keeping my calendar flawless—scheduling meetings across time zones, sending reminders, and rescheduling on the fly when priorities shift. At the same time, I’d like you to watch my primary inbox, filter out low-value messages, draft quick responses, and flag anything that needs my direct input. When travel comes up, you’ll research options, secure the best flights and hotels, and send me a clear itinerary for approval.

I prefer quick, direct phone calls for updates and urgent questions, so you must be comfortable speaking on the phone and able to reach me promptly during business hours. The sooner we get started, the better—I’m looking to have you fully operational within days, not weeks.

Deliverables
• Up-to-date, well-organized calendar with weekly summary 
• Streamlined inbox with priority tags and drafted replies 
• Confirmed travel bookings and shareable itineraries 

Familiarity with Google Workspace, Slack, and standard booking platforms will help you hit the ground running. Discretion, attention to detail, and fluent English are non-negotiable. If you have a solid track record supporting busy executives and can start ASAP, let’s talk.

full_description:
Project Overview 
We are looking for an experienced PCB designer to develop a compact production ready DC-DC boost converter PCB for our RC product lineup. The PCB size is fixed and must match our existing RC chassis mounting system. 
The board will take input from a single 3.7V 18650 Li-ion battery and boost it to a stable constant 12V output capable of driving either BO motors or N20 motors continuously without major voltage drop under load. 
This is intended for mass production, so the design must be reliable, cost optimized, manufacturable, and use easily available components. 
The final design must be fully production ready and suitable for commercial manufacturing. 

PCB Size and Mechanical Constraints 
PCB dimensions are fixed: 
60mm x 38mm 
All components must be placed only on the top side of the PCB. 
The placement of JST connectors and capacitor positions are fixed to match our existing RC chassis and 
locking system. 
Please strictly follow the provided coordinates and orientations. 
PCB Functional Requirements 
Main Function 
Input: 
Single 3.7V 18650 Li-ion battery 
Output: 
Stable constant 12V DC output 
The board should: 
• Boost 3.7V battery voltage to regulated 12V 
• Maintain stable output voltage under motor load 
• Power 2 DC motors continuously 
• Power 2 external 3V LEDs 
• Turn ON and OFF using an external switch connected through JST connector 
• LEDs should turn ON immediately when PCB is powered 
• Motors should start running immediately when PCB is powered 
 
Connectors and Fixed Positions 
JST Connector Details 
Connector Part Number: 
B2B-XH-A(LF)(SN) 
All connectors are through hole type.
Capacitor Placement Constraints 
We currently have locking structures in our RC chassis based on capacitor positions from our old PCB. 
You may use 2 or 3 capacitors as needed for the design, but please place them within the following 
locations as much as possible. 
Maintaining similar capacitor size is preferred. 
Capacitor Footprint: 
Capacitor_SMD:CP_Elec_8x11.9 
Capacitor Part Number: 
JVE16V470M8X10 
Motor Specifications 
The designer must properly calculate current requirements and select suitable ICs, inductors, capacitors, 
and track widths. 
BO Motor Specifications 
Operating Voltage: 
3V to 12V 
No Load Current: 
40mA to 180mA 
Rated Speed: 
60 RPM 
Rated Torque: 
1 kg·cm 
N20 Motor Specifications 
Operating Voltage: 
6V to 12V 
Rated Voltage: 
12V 
Rated Speed: 
60 RPM 
Stall Current: 
0.75A 
Rated Torque: 
0.97 kg·cm 
Stall Torque: 
3.0 kg·cm 
Design Requirements 
Important Requirements 
• Output voltage must remain stable at 12V under motor load 
• Avoid major voltage drop during startup or load changes 
• Use proper inductors and efficient boost converter IC 
• Track widths must support required motor current safely 
• Design must be suitable for long term operation 
• Use low cost and easily available components 
• Manufacturing cost target for PCB assembly should remain below Rs.100 if possible 
• Avoid expensive or difficult to source components 
• Design should be optimized for mass production 
• Use proper grounding and power routing practices 
• Thermal performance should be considered 
• All SMD components should be placed on top side only 
Deliverables Required 
The freelancer must provide all production files required for manufacturing. 
Required files: 
• Complete schematic design 
• PCB layout design 
• Editable KiCad project files 
• Gerber files 
• Drill files 
• BOM 
• Pick and Place files 
• 3D PCB files 
• PDF schematics 
• PCB fabrication outputs 
• Assembly files 
• Any additional files required for manufacturing 
Workflow Requirement 
Step 1: 
Designer must first create and share schematic design for approval. 
Step 2: 
Only after schematic approval should PCB layout design begin. 
Preferred Skills 
Looking for a designer experienced in: 
• DC-DC boost converter design 
• Power electronics 
• Battery powered PCB systems 
• KiCad PCB design 
• High current PCB routing 
• Manufacturing ready PCB development 
• Cost optimized electronics design 
Additional Notes 
This PCB must fit inside our existing RC product enclosure, so connector and capacitor placement 
accuracy is very important. 
The design should be clean, practical, and production ready, not just a prototype level design. 
Please share previous similar power supply or boost converter PCB work while applying.

Because the exact subject matter and length vary from section to section, please be prepared to handle anything from straightforward narrative to the occasional technical phrase. full_description:
Hello guys, we are hiring professionals from the USA, if you are fit for this profile please apply

Research Analyst
Research Institute of Peace and Security (RIPS)
Remote – United States Preferred

About RIPS

The Research Institute of Peace and Security (RIPS) is an independent research organization focused on international relations, geopolitics, national security, strategic studies, defense policy, and emerging global challenges. Our work supports policymakers, research institutions, industry experts, and strategic decision-makers through evidence-based analysis and forward-looking research.
RIPS is expanding its network of researchers and subject-matter experts with strong backgrounds in security, defense, technology, and geopolitical analysis.

Position Overview

RIPS is seeking experienced Researchers and Think Tank Professionals based in the United States to contribute to research projects related to international security, geopolitics, national defense, and advanced technology sectors.
We are particularly interested in candidates with research or industry experience in:

Aerospace and defense technologies
Cybersecurity and cyber warfare
Artificial intelligence and emerging technologies
Information technology and digital infrastructure
National security and strategic affairs
International relations and geopolitical risk analysis
Defense innovation and military modernization
Key Responsibilities
Conduct in-depth research and policy analysis on global security and geopolitical developments
Prepare research papers, analytical reports, and strategic assessments
Monitor developments in defense, technology, cybersecurity, and international affairs
Contribute expert insights to ongoing institutional research projects
Collaborate with interdisciplinary researchers and policy professionals
Support the development of recommendations related to national security and strategic policy

Qualifications

Background in international relations, political science, security studies, defense studies, cybersecurity, aerospace, information technology, or related fields
Strong analytical, research, and report-writing skills
Experience working with think tanks, research institutions, government agencies, defense sectors, or technology organizations is highly preferred
Understanding of current geopolitical and security trends
Ability to work independently in a remote research environment
Advanced degree or equivalent professional experience preferred

full_description:
I have the [login to view URL] React + TanStack Start UI already in place; now I need it wired to a real-time forecasting backend that can service 100 stores and roughly 10 k SKUs per store from a daily POS feed.

Scope 
• Ingest the feed in CSV first, with the code structured so we can swap to JSON or Parquet later without touching business logic. 
• Store raw and feature-engineered data in partitioned Parquet inside S3, queried locally through DuckDB/Polars and cached in Redis. 
• Train and serve forecasts with LightGBM and Croston/TSB, orchestrated by Airflow. 
• Ship a single-node pipeline that is production-ready yet cleanly abstracted for a 2–4 week lift to PySpark on EMR Serverless when volumes grow. 
• Expose the pipeline through createServerFn so the existing React storefront can request forecasts in real time.

What must be fully exercised by end-to-end tests (Playwright + Vitest + pytest): 
• Data ingestion & processing 
• Machine-learning prediction paths 
• Data storage & retrieval 
• UI-to-API round-trips across the entire flow

Deliverables 
1. Terraform definitions and IAM policies for S3, Redis/ElastiCache, Lambda endpoints and Airflow. 
2. Python package (DuckDB/Polars, LightGBM, Croston) with unit tests and typed docs. 
3. Airflow DAGs ready to deploy, parameterised for store/SKU segmentation. 
4. TypeScript server adapters that plug straight into the TanStack Start frontend. 
5. Playwright, Vitest and pytest suites running in CI, green from ingestion to on-screen forecast. 
6. A concise migration guide outlining what changes when we switch the compute engine to Spark.

Please bid only if you have hands-on experience scaling a single-node ML pipeline to Spark and can share references of similar projects.

full_description:
PROJECT BRIEF
Part-Time Digital Marketing Manager
For Patricia Searing, Ph.D. - "The Empowerment Doctor"
ABOUT THE PROJECT
I am launching a personal/professional development and organizational transformation brand centered around original frameworks including:
Searing Method TM
Third Force Thought TM
Point of Origin TM Technology
My work integrates:
Human & Organization Development
Learning Organizations
Leadership Development
Personal Transformation
Emotional/Somatic Awareness
Educational and transformational content
I already have:
A completed digital marketing strategy
Website in development
Content systems
Scripts and posting plans
Lead magnet concepts
Social media direction
Webinar and video strategy
I now need a part-time Digital Marketing Manager / Content Coordinator to help implement the plan consistently and professionally.
IDEAL CANDIDATE
This role is ideal for:
A graduate student
Advanced marketing student
Emerging digital marketer
Social media/content specialist building experience
Someone organized, creative, and reliable
I do not need a large agency or expensive senior strategist.
I do need someone who can:
Follow systems
Execute consistently
Organize content
Help schedule and post
Assist with growth and visibility
Communicate clearly and professionally
SCOPE OF WORK
PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES
Content Management
Organize content calendar
Schedule posts across platforms
Maintain consistency in branding and messaging
Repurpose content into multiple formats
Social Media Management
Platforms include:
Instagram
Facebook
LinkedIn
YouTube Shorts
Tasks:
Upload and schedule posts
Format captions
Apply hashtags
Monitor engagement
Light community interaction
Video & Content Support
Assist with short-form video posting
Add captions/subtitles if possible
Help organize content library
Create simple Canva-style graphics/posts
Email Marketing Support
Upload email drafts into platform
Help organize lead magnet delivery
Support webinar announcements
Website & Content Coordination
Coordinate blog uploads
Organize SEO keywords
Help maintain consistency between social platforms and website messaging
TOOLS (Preferred but Not Required)
Helpful experience with:
Canva
Google Docs
Google Drive
YouTube
Instagram Reels
Facebook Business tools
LinkedIn posting
Mailchimp or ConvertKit
Basic SEO understanding
Scheduling platforms (Later, Buffer, Meta Suite, etc.)
WORK STYLE
This role requires someone who is:
Organized
Consistent
Calm under direction
Able to follow an existing strategy
Interested in transformational, educational, or personal development content
Strong communication skills are important.
TIME COMMITMENT
Estimated:
5-10 hours/week initially
Potential to expand later
Flexible remote work.
BUDGET
This is a startup-stage project.
I am specifically seeking:
affordable emerging talent
student-level or early-career rates
someone interested in growing with the brand over time
Please include:
hourly or monthly rates
examples of social posting work
organizational systems experience
video/content samples if available
TO APPLY
Please send:
Brief introduction
Why this role interests you
Relevant experience
Social/content samples
Availability
Hourly or monthly rate
PROJECT GOAL
The goal is to build a strong, authentic digital presence that supports:
personal transformation
leadership development
organizational learning
educational content
webinars
lead generation
online visibility
Long-term growth potential exists for the right person.
Applicants must have excellent command of English language, no exceptions

full_description:
I am launching a new business in the United States and need an experienced, U-S-based professional to get our RingCentral account fully up and running. The goal is to hand over a clean, correctly configured system that my team can start using immediately for voice, SMS, and basic call routing.

Here is what I expect from the engagement:
• Complete initial account creation with the correct company details and U.S. address verification 
• Configuration of main company number, extensions, voicemail, and call flow so incoming calls reach the right person every time 
• Basic auto-attendant greeting and after-hours rules 
• Confirmation that emergency (E911) information is filed properly for all extensions 
• A short hand-off session (video or in person if you are nearby) showing me where critical settings live

Because this is for a brand-new enterprise, there are no legacy systems to migrate. At this stage I do not need integrations or user training beyond the brief walkthrough described above. 

When you apply, focus on your direct experience setting up RingCentral (or similar VoIP platforms) for U.S. businesses—particularly any cases where you handled the full initial build. If you have certifications or can share a quick success story, that will help me choose quickly.

I am ready to begin as soon as I find the right expert who can demonstrate clear, hands-on RingCentral setup expertise within the United States.
